frictions.description: OpenRouter free tier rate limit (20 req/min, 50 req/day) severely restricts testing of AI-dependent features. This affected 9 assertions directly and blocked 5 more indirectly.

Plan auto-save feature is NOT WORKING. Plans generated via AI chat do not persist to the transfer_plans table. Dashboard consistently shows 'No plans yet' even after AI generates a plan. The fix-plan-auto-save feature is pending.

blockers.description: OpenRouter API rate limit exceeded. The free tier allows 20 requests per minute / 50 requests per day. Cannot generate plans to test display, persistence, or loading functionality.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Waited for rate limit to reset between attempts, but limit persisted across test session. Free tier is insufficient for comprehensive testing.

blockers.description: Plan auto-save not functioning - plans generated via AI chat do not persist to the database. Dashboard consistently shows 'No plans yet' empty state even after successful AI plan generation.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Verified dashboard state multiple times, checked for console errors - issue persists. fix-plan-auto-save feature is pending implementation.

notes: Round 2 validation completed. Same results as Round 1 - no progress on blocked assertions because the underlying issues (OpenRouter rate limit and plan auto-save bug) remain unresolved. The fix-plan-auto-save feature is still pending. Error handling assertions (VAL-CHAT-004, VAL-CHAT-005, VAL-CHAT-006, VAL-CHAT-007) continue to pass.
